title: Key Management, Rotation, HSMs, KMS, and Compromise · Execution Trace: Crypto Go Key Lifecycle
summary: A platform stores a master key in source control, rotates aliases without proving old reads, grants every service decrypt authority, and has no compromise recovery drill. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the key lifecycle increment in key lifecycle, custody, and rotation runbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debug…
objectives: Define generation, registration, activation, distribution, use, suspension, rotation, archival, recovery, revocation, destruction, and evidence ownership.
Rotate recipient or KEK protection by authenticated rewrapping while preserving payload identity, audit, rollback, and revocation limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Key Lifecycle · Theory Crypto Go Key Lifecycle
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 9931 during a certificate rollover incident. Build deterministic Go evidence to enforce immutable key identity, state, cryptoperiod, least privilege, and tested recovery; cap bytes, work, memory, time, attempts, concurrency, and retained secret material before use; then rotate the active key while old data remains readable and new writes cannot downgrade. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Define generation, registration, activation, distribution, use, suspension, rotation, archival, recovery, revocation, destruction, and evidence ownership.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Crypto Go Key Lifecycle contract for the supplied data.
